title: Empattu Lyrics Poomani Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Empattu empaattu
nenjinikkum poongaathu

Empattu empaattu
nenjinikkum  poongaathu
thaalaattu thaalaattu
thaavi varum thaenoothu

un pozhudhu poganum
enako polappa paakkanum
unna paludhu paarkkanum
enakulla azhudhu theerkanum

adi maney
un nenja thuvaikkira
raagam idhu

Empattu empaattu
nenjinikkum  poongaathu
thaalaattu thaalaattu
thaavi varum thaenoothu

Azhagaana maadathile
vandha kili irandu
vandha kili irandu

adhil aalolam paadi
manam nondha kili ondru
nondha kili ondru

kaathirundha chinna kili
kaayam pattu kaththuthadi
nethu vandha vannakili
nenja nenja koththuthadi

ilamaaney..
thaththalikkum oththa kili
thaavudhadi vettu kili

nizhal thaedum kili
ingae nijam kaanumaa?

Empattu empaattu
nenjinikkum  poongaathu
thaalaattu thaalaattu
thaavi varum thaenoothu

un pozhudhu poganum
enako polappa paakkanum
unna paludhu paarkkanum
enakulla azhudhu theerkanum

adi maney
un nenja thuvaikkira
raagam idhu

Empattu empaattu
nenjinikkum  poongaathu
thaalaattu thaalaattu
thaavi varum thaenoothu

aaththoram vaeli katti
nandhavanam potten
naan nandhavanamm potten

adhil azhagaana
malar chedigal
nattuvaithu valarnthaen
naan nattuvaithu
valarthaen

poomalara vandhadhellaam
puththam pudhu vaasamadi
pooppraikka vandhavalo
puthiyila mosamadi

adi maaney
kayyila ulla
muththu charam
pathirama vachchikanum

oru noolu
pirindhaalum
udhirndoumey..

Empattu empaattu
nenjinikkum  poongaathu
thaalaattu thaalaattu
thaavi varum thaenoothu

un pozhudhu poganum
enako polappa paakkanum
unna paludhu paarkkanum
enakulla azhudhu theerkanum

adi maney
un nenja thuvaikkira
raagam idhu

Empattu empaattu
nenjinikkum  poongaathu
thaalaattu thaalaattu
thaavi varum thaenoothu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Empattu'?

The song 'Empattu' expresses deep emotions of longing and heartache, reflecting the complexities of love.

In which movie does 'Empattu' feature?

'Empattu' is featured in the movie Poomani, which explores themes of love and relationships.

Who is the singer of 'Empattu'?

The song is sung by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, who is also the music director for this track.

When was 'Empattu' released?

'Empattu' was released on December 6, 1996, and has since become a cherished classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Empattu' from Poomani encapsulates the feelings of heartbreak and yearning. It beautifully conveys the pain of separation and the memories that linger in the heart. With its melancholic tune and poignant lyrics, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia that resonates deeply with listeners. The masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja adds to the emotional weight, making it a timeless piece in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Empattu is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of longing and nostalgia. With Poomani as its backdrop, this song showcases the unmatched brilliance of Ilaiyaraaja in music composition. The heartfelt lyrics and soulful rendition make it a timeless classic that resonates with listeners even today.
stanzaMeanings: This is a song that touches the heart.
This is a song that touches the heart, it will come with a rhythm and a beat.
I want your moments to pass, I want to see your beauty, I want to see you and I want to end my tears inside.
This is the melody that cleanses your heart.
This is a song that touches the heart, it will come with a rhythm and a beat.
Two beautiful birds have come to the garden.
In it, one bird sings and the other feels the pain.
The little bird that was waiting has caught the attention of the heart, the bird that came yesterday has stirred the heart.
Oh my dear, the bird that is in the house is singing sweetly.
Will the shadow-seeking bird see the truth here?
This is a song that touches the heart, it will come with a rhythm and a beat.
I want your moments to pass, I want to see your beauty, I want to see you and I want to end my tears inside.
This is the melody that cleanses your heart.
This is a song that touches the heart, it will come with a rhythm and a beat.
I have built a beautiful garden in the open air, I have made it a paradise.
In it, beautiful flowers bloom and grow, I have nurtured them.
All the blooming flowers bring a new fragrance, but if they come, it will be a new trouble.
This is the pearl that should be held in the hand, it should be placed in the heart.
Even if a thread breaks, it will still be connected...
This is a song that touches the heart, it will come with a rhythm and a beat.
